economic_notes: First Nation has investments in Deh Tai GP Ltd., Deh Tai Limited Partnership, and FNFN Forestry Limited Partnership accounted for by modified equity method. Liard Hotsprings Lodge (FNFN) Ltd. is fully consolidated. Publicly traded securities portfolio of $20,495,805. Portfolio investments held in trust of $10,834,681. Ottawa Trust funds of $10,410,292.
notes: Financial statements are for fiscal year ended March 31, 2023, not 2024. Four entities fully consolidated: Liard Hotsprings Lodge (FNFN) Ltd., Chalo Independent School Society, Fort Nelson Indian Band Land Trust Society, and Reaching For Our Vision Trust. Three GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: Deh Tai GP Ltd., Deh Tai Limited Partnership, and FNFN Forestry Limited Partnership. Balance sheet details (accounts receivable, current liabilities, deferred revenue, long-term debt, tangible capital assets) were partially cut off in the provided text. Net financial assets of $63,902,443 taken from Statement of Changes in Net Financial Assets (actual). Total government transfers calculated as ISC + Province of BC + FNHA + Government of Canada + NENA + FNESC + CMHC = 6,740,166 + 19,168,954 + 1,248,572 + 1,052,991 + 119,616 + 498,564 + 150,841 = 28,979,704; gaming revenue sharing LP may also qualify bringing total to 29,652,628. Loss on investments in First Nation business entities of $996,790 is a non-cash item but recurring in nature.
